answers: Start sewing: learn to thread a needle, basic hand stitches (running, backstitch), then move to a sewing machine.
Sewing machine basics: practice straight lines on scrap fabric, learn to pivot corners, adjust tension, and change bobbins.
Beginner projects: pillow case, tote bag, scrunchie, face mask. Simple shapes with straight lines.
Silai shekha: prothome haath e shuru koro, tarpor machine e jao. YouTube e tutorials dekho. Easy project diye start koro.
